profile.name: Dr. Jitendra V. Tembhurne
profile.title: Assistant Professor
profile.department: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
profile.institution: Indian Institute of Information Technology Nagpur

aboutMe:
Dr. Jitendra V. Tembhurne is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at the Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Nagpur, where he has been a faculty member since 2018. He also served as the Head of the Department from 2020 to 2022. He earned his Ph.D. from Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT), Nagpur in 2017, specializing in Parallel Computing. He received his M.E. with Distinction (University Rank Holder) from MGM's College of Engineering, Nanded, and his B.E. from Kavikulguru Institute of Technology & Science (KITS), Ramtek, Nagpur.

His research spans Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Cyber Security, IoT, Wireless Sensor Networks, and Parallel Computing. He has published over 45 journal papers (26 SCI, 19 Scopus-indexed), 7 book chapters, 14 conference papers, 2 preprints, and 19 internship publications. He holds 3 patents (including one Australian patent). He has successfully completed a funded research project under the EMEQ Scheme, SERB, India, and has supervised 3 completed Ph.D. students with 10 ongoing.

Dr. Tembhurne actively serves as a reviewer for top-tier journals including IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, IEEE Transactions on Cloud Computing, IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing, ACM Transactions on Multimedia Computing, and many more. He is UGC-NET qualified and GATE qualified in Computer Science.

researchInterests._comment: Add a short intro paragraph and then bullet points for specific research areas.
researchInterests.intro: His research focuses on Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Parallel Computing, Cyber Security, and IoT. His work aims to develop innovative techniques in the following areas:
areas: Competitive Programming & Algorithms: efficient problem-solving and algorithmic optimizations
Parallel & Quantum Computing: parallel algorithms for cryptographic operations, GCD computation, and parameter estimation in NISQ devices
Cyber Security & Authentication: lightweight multifactor authentication techniques for Telecare Medicine Information Systems (TMIS)
Internet of Things (IoT) & WSN: smart food-cold chain systems, forest fire detection, and RSSI/AoA based localization
Deep Learning Applications: medical diagnosis (cancer, heart disease, stroke, Alzheimer's), plant disease detection, and sentiment analysis
Federated Learning: privacy-preserving and contextual cross-attention frameworks for multicenter diverse datasets
